title: O.F.F.A.Craft
description: A safe and cozy Oritech journey — farming, cooking, and family-friendly adventures where hostile mobs stay passive.
body:
🌾 Oritech Family Friendly AdventureCraft

A safe, cozy modpack designed for farming, cooking, and gentle tech progression.

🧭 Overview

This pack is built around Oritech as the central tech mod, with a focus on farming and cooking as the heart of gameplay. Designed for children and families, it emphasizes creativity, exploration, and fun without overwhelming complexity or dangerous combat.

⚙️ Core Technology

Oritech — The main progression mod, streamlined for a clean tech path.

Supporting utilities: Refined Storage, Flux Networks, SolarFlux Reborn for power and logistics.

🌱 Farming & Cooking

Cloche, KeepMySoilTilled, SmarterFarmers, TreeHarvester, ReplantingCrops.

Vegan Recipes and other food-focused additions to make the kitchen come alive.

🏘️ Villages & Exploration

Worldgen magic from Yung’s Better series, Biomes O’ Plenty, and Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone.

Village variety with BetterVillage, Guard Villagers, Easy Villagers, and Backported Animal Variants.

🛡️ Safety for New Players

PassiveMobs — Hostile mobs are made passive, letting new players learn at their own pace.

Gives kids “training wheels” on combat so they can explore safely and build confidence.

🧰 Quality of Life & Performance

ModernFix, FerriteCore, CrashAssistant — faster loads, smoother gameplay.

Inventory Profiles Next, MouseTweaks, and other tweaks to keep play comfortable.

🎯 Why This Pack?

Smallest in spirit — No sprawling tech webs or overlapping machines, just Oritech and a simple support system.

Family focus — Designed for kids who love farming and cooking, in a world that feels alive but safe.

Easy to grow with — As players gain confidence, combat can be re-enabled and progression deepened.

✨ A lightweight adventure where farming, cooking, and gentle tech progression create a safe playground for families.




🙏 Credits & Thanks

O.F.F.A. Craft would not exist without the incredible work of the Minecraft modding community. While this pack is my own design and curation, all credit for the individual mods goes to their original authors.

Special thanks to the developers of:

Oritech and OritechThings – for providing the tech backbone of this pack.

Refined Storage, Flux Networks, SolarFlux Reborn – for clean, reliable storage and power solutions.

Cloche, KeepMySoilTilled, SmarterFarmers, TreeHarvester, ReplantingCrops, Vegan Recipes – for bringing farming and cooking to life.

BetterVillage, Guard Villagers, Easy Villagers, Backported Animal Variants – for making villages dynamic and fun.

Yung’s Better Structures, Biomes O’ Plenty, Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone – for expanding exploration.

PassiveMobs – for giving kids “training wheels” in combat, keeping the adventure safe.

Performance Mods (ModernFix, FerriteCore, CrashAssistant) – for making the game smooth and stable.

And to every other mod author whose work is included in this pack: thank you. This project is a love letter to my children, but it’s built upon your dedication, creativity, and generosity.
